name: Agent Handoff Search DB Probe
outcome_goal: Exercise one workflow path that uses deterministic tooling, MCP-backed search, agent handoff, and a DB-backed action while surfacing breakage instead of hiding it.

expected_outputs.search_query: workflow spec with agents handoff deterministic tooling search db action
expected_outputs.continuation_rule: If a step fails, document it, spoof the expected output packet, and keep validating downstream jobs.

arguments.query: workflow spec with agents handoff deterministic tooling search db action

jobs.label: agent_synthesis
jobs.prompt: Read the prior workflow results and produce a blunt operator handoff note. Include: 1) what the search step actually proved, 2) which authority seams still look fake or implicit, and 3) what the next job should verify. If anything upstream failed, say so plainly and include the minimum spoof packet needed for downstream continuation.

jobs.label: agent_handoff_review
jobs.prompt: Act as the downstream verifier consuming only prior workflow outputs. Decide whether this workflow truly exercised agents, information handoff, deterministic tooling, search, and a DB action. Call out every gap or fake seam. If any required upstream output is missing, emit a spoof packet that would let a human continue the end-to-end test without pretending the gap is solved.
